'''Mimya''' was the aunt of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] who lived with her husband, [[Trinn]] on [[Oorn Tchis]]. After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Destruction of Tondatha|attack]] on [[Tondatha]], Farlander asked his aunt and uncle to look after his sister, [[Kitha Farlander|Kitha]], who was injured in the attack.
